items.description: schedule_tasks accepts a parameter 'tasks' which is a list of unique task name strings
items.expected_behavior: Function accepts a list of unique strings as 'tasks' parameter without error

items.description: schedule_tasks accepts a parameter 'dependencies' which is a list of pairs of strings representing dependency edges
items.expected_behavior: Function accepts a list of tuple pairs of strings as 'dependencies' parameter without error

items.description: schedule_tasks returns a list of strings representing a valid ordering of all tasks
items.expected_behavior: Return value is a list of strings containing all tasks in a valid execution order

items.description: Returned execution order contains every task from input exactly once
items.expected_behavior: Output list contains all input tasks exactly once, no duplicates or omissions

items.description: For every dependency (A, B), A appears before B in the returned order
items.expected_behavior: In output list, each task A precedes task B for all (A, B) dependencies

items.description: When multiple tasks are available, lexicographically smallest task is selected first
items.expected_behavior: Output order is deterministic and favors lexicographically smallest available task at each step

items.description: Function raises ValueError if 'tasks' list contains duplicate task names
items.expected_behavior: Calling function with duplicate task names raises ValueError

items.description: Function raises ValueError if any dependency refers to a task not in 'tasks' list
items.expected_behavior: Calling function with dependencies referencing unknown tasks raises ValueError

items.description: Function raises ValueError if a circular dependency exists among tasks
items.expected_behavior: Calling function with circular dependencies raises ValueError

items.description: Function raises TypeError if 'tasks' parameter is not a list
items.expected_behavior: Calling function with non-list 'tasks' raises TypeError

items.description: Function raises TypeError if 'dependencies' parameter is not a list
items.expected_behavior: Calling function with non-list 'dependencies' raises TypeError

items.description: Function raises TypeError if any task name in 'tasks' is not a string
items.expected_behavior: Calling function with non-string task names raises TypeError

items.description: Function raises TypeError if any dependency is not a pair of strings
items.expected_behavior: Calling function with dependencies not pairs of strings raises TypeError

items.description: Function returns empty list if 'tasks' and 'dependencies' are both empty
items.expected_behavior: Calling function with empty inputs returns empty list

items.description: Function returns list containing single task if one task with no dependencies
items.expected_behavior: Calling function with one task and no dependencies returns list with that task

items.description: Function returns multiple tasks in lexicographic order if no dependencies
items.expected_behavior: Calling function with multiple tasks and no dependencies returns tasks sorted lexicographically

items.description: Function returns tasks in dependency order for a long dependency chain
items.expected_behavior: Output order respects the linear dependency chain order

items.description: Function produces deterministic order using lexicographic availability for multiple independent chains
items.expected_behavior: Output order is deterministic and lexicographically ordered among available tasks from independent chains

items.description: Function returns tasks so downstream tasks appear after all prerequisites in diamond-shaped graph
items.expected_behavior: Output order respects diamond dependency structure with prerequisites before downstream tasks

items.description: Task names are case-sensitive
items.expected_behavior: Function treats task names with different cases as distinct tasks

items.description: Function returns only the ordering of tasks without executing tasks or side effects
items.expected_behavior: Function output is a list of task names only; no side effects occur

items.description: Function implements a standard topological sort algorithm
items.expected_behavior: Function output is consistent with standard topological sort semantics

items.description: Function runs in O((N + E) log N) time and uses O(N + E) space
items.expected_behavior: Function performance is consistent with stated time and space complexity
